why_it_matters: GPU租赁、AI cloud backlog、重资产融资是 AI infra 信用风险核心样本
primary_sources_to_find: 10-K/10-Q or registration filings; earnings release; debt filings; customer contract disclosure; investor presentation
metrics_to_verify: revenue backlog quality; debt maturity; interest expense; lease liabilities; capex commitments; customer concentration; GPU depreciation/useful life; operating cash flow
upgrade_signal: backlog has strong take-or-pay/prepayment terms, utilization high, interest coverage improving, debt maturity manageable
downgrade_signal: backlog not cash-backed, customer concentration high, interest expense/depreciation outrun gross profit, GPU residual assumptions weaken

why_it_matters: 欧洲/全球 AI cloud 扩张样本，融资和利用率决定是否是真平台还是重资产周期
primary_sources_to_find: annual report; quarterly results; investor presentation; debt/lease disclosure; customer and capacity announcements
metrics_to_verify: AI cloud revenue; capex; debt; lease liabilities; utilization; customer quality; power secured; cash burn
upgrade_signal: secured customers and power convert into revenue with manageable leverage
downgrade_signal: capex and debt rise faster than revenue; customer quality/utilization unclear

why_it_matters: 大型云厂商里 AI infra capex、租赁和债务压力较突出，能代表 hyperscaler 信用扩张边界
primary_sources_to_find: 10-K/10-Q; earnings release; earnings call; debt footnotes; capex/depreciation disclosure
metrics_to_verify: cloud infrastructure revenue; RPO/backlog; capex; debt; remaining performance obligations; depreciation; operating cash flow
upgrade_signal: AI cloud demand converts to RPO/revenue while FCF and credit metrics remain resilient
downgrade_signal: AI capex/depreciation/debt pressure outruns cloud margin expansion

why_it_matters: AI 数据中心开发商样本，项目融资、客户合同和施工交付是核心风险
primary_sources_to_find: 10-K/10-Q; project financing filings; customer contract announcements; investor presentation
metrics_to_verify: project financing; customer contracts; construction milestones; capex; debt maturity; interest expense; cash runway
upgrade_signal: signed customers and financing align with project delivery and cash collection
downgrade_signal: construction delays, financing gaps, customer concentration, dilution/debt pressure

why_it_matters: BTC mining 转 AI DC 的典型样本，需要区分 power asset 和 crypto beta
primary_sources_to_find: annual report; quarterly results; AI cloud contracts; debt/lease filings; power asset disclosure
metrics_to_verify: AI cloud revenue; BTC revenue mix; power capacity; customer contracts; capex; debt; GPU utilization
upgrade_signal: AI contracts and power capacity produce non-BTC recurring revenue with controlled leverage
downgrade_signal: BTC cycle dominates; AI contracts weak; financing or execution risk rises

why_it_matters: 破产重组后转 AI hosting/power campuses，信用结构本身就是研究重点
primary_sources_to_find: 10-K/10-Q; restructuring/debt filings; customer contracts; hosting agreements; investor presentation
metrics_to_verify: hosting backlog; customer concentration; debt; lease obligations; power campuses; capex; FCF
upgrade_signal: long-term customer contracts and improved balance sheet support AI hosting conversion
downgrade_signal: debt/capex pressure returns; customer concentration; BTC economics dominate

why_it_matters: powered land + BTC/HPC transition样本，适合观察融资和电力资产价值
primary_sources_to_find: 10-K/10-Q; power contract disclosure; AI/HPC customer announcements; debt filings
metrics_to_verify: power capacity; AI/HPC contracts; BTC exposure; debt maturity; capex; cash burn
upgrade_signal: firm AI/HPC contracts validate power asset conversion
downgrade_signal: BTC exposure dominates; AI customers unproven; financing gap

why_it_matters: 中国/亚洲 IDC 重资产样本，融资成本、利用率和客户结构是核心
primary_sources_to_find: annual report; interim report; debt maturity disclosure; utilization and pre-lease disclosure
metrics_to_verify: net debt; interest expense; utilization; customer concentration; capex; occupancy; maturity wall
upgrade_signal: AI/data center demand improves utilization and cash flow while leverage stabilizes
downgrade_signal: debt maturity, low utilization, refinancing cost or customer churn pressure

why_it_matters: 云服务亏损/毛利修复样本，适合验证 AI cloud 是否改善现金流
primary_sources_to_find: annual report; quarterly results; debt/cash flow disclosures; customer disclosures
metrics_to_verify: AI/cloud revenue; gross margin; operating cash flow; debt/cash; customer concentration
upgrade_signal: AI demand improves margin and cash burn without aggressive leverage
downgrade_signal: losses persist; AI revenue not separable; financing or competition pressure

why_it_matters: 全球 colo benchmark，用于对比 NeoCloud/IDC 的成熟资产现金流和杠杆
primary_sources_to_find: 10-K/10-Q; supplemental package; debt maturity schedule; leasing metrics
metrics_to_verify: AFFO; net debt/EBITDA; occupancy; bookings; capex; interconnection revenue; debt maturity
upgrade_signal: AI/colo demand improves bookings while leverage and AFFO remain healthy
downgrade_signal: capex rises, occupancy/margins weaken, debt costs pressure AFFO

why_it_matters: 批发数据中心/colo benchmark，适合看 AI demand 对 REIT 现金流和融资的传导

metrics_to_verify: leasing volume; renewal spreads; development pipeline; debt maturity; AFFO; capex
upgrade_signal: AI leasing converts to cash yield and stable funding
downgrade_signal: development capex and debt costs pressure returns

company: iShares iBoxx High Yield Corporate Bond ETF
